case_title: ZOHRAB KHOUROUZIAN VS. UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KHOUROUZIAN, ZOHRAB AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC (ARTHUR B. GUGONT SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MARK T. BOOTH--GENERAL DENTIST/PROFESSOR. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHOUROUZIAN, ZOHRAB IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC (ARTHUR B. GUGONT SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
